listing_qr.title: QR Code: {name}
listing_qr.qr_expiry_note: Refreshes every minute. Each code expires {time} after it was generated.
listing_qr.page_description_start: Generate a signed link that pre-fills the booking form. If name and price are both set and the listing has no extra required fields
listing_qr.page_description_end: , the scanner is taken straight to payment.
listing_qr.price_hint_fixed: Overrides the ticket price of {price} for this booking
